summary: Iteration 9 testing complete - All 7 new features verified working. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 11 test scenarios passed.

issues: Console warning: rgba color format not conforming to #rrggbb format in color picker - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: --- FEATURE 1: Seconds with leading zero ---
Display.js uses String(time.getSeconds()).padStart(2,'0') for seconds
Seconds displayed as '25' (with leading zero when < 10)
--- FEATURE 2: Weather city configurable in Settings ---
Settings page has 'Meteo' section with weather_city input (data-testid='weather-city-input')
GET /api/settings returns weather_city field
PUT /api/settings accepts weather_city parameter
Weather city persists after save (verified 'Paris' saved correctly)
Display page uses weather_city from settings for weather widget
--- FEATURE 3: More visible background animations ---
animations.js has 12 animations with increased opacity (0.15-0.8 range)
Bokeh animation visible on Display page with floating circles
--- FEATURE 4: Theme CSS separate from custom CSS ---
Settings page custom_css textarea does NOT contain THEME: or ANIM: markers
ThemesPage.js saves to 'theme_css' field instead of 'custom_css'
PUT /api/settings accepts theme_css field
Display.js injects both theme_css and custom_css separately
Migration logic moves old THEME CSS from custom_css to theme_css
--- FEATURE 5: Hide #emergent-badge CSS hardcoded ---
#emergent-badge CSS present in /app/frontend/src/index.css
CSS includes: display:none, visibility:hidden, width:0, height:0, opacity:0
Display.js also injects #emergent-badge hide CSS in <style> tag
--- FEATURE 6: Flash Info alert system ---
Flash Info nav link present in sidebar (data-testid='nav-flash-info')
/flash-info route configured in App.js
FlashInfoPage.js loads with 'Envoyer une alerte' form
Flash message input found (data-testid='flash-message-input')
Send alert button found (data-testid='send-alert-btn')
POST /api/flash-alert creates new alert successfully
Active alert section appears after sending
Dismiss button found (data-testid='dismiss-alert-btn')
DELETE /api/flash-alert deactivates alert
GET /api/flash-alerts returns alerts history list
History section shows all past alerts with timestamps
--- FEATURE 7: Eco mode with time range ---
Settings page has 'Mode eco' section with switch (data-testid='eco-mode-switch')
Eco mode start time input found (data-testid='eco-mode-start')
Eco mode end time input found (data-testid='eco-mode-end')
PUT /api/settings accepts eco_mode_enabled, eco_mode_start, eco_mode_end
Eco mode settings persist (verified: enabled=true, start=22:00, end=07:00)
Display.js has eco mode logic that shows black screen during eco hours
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo client account
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 verified 7 new features: (1) Seconds with leading zero in Display.js line 291 using padStart(2,'0'). (2) Weather city in Settings.js lines 100-115 with data-testid='weather-city-input'. (3) Animations in animations.js with increased opacity (0.15-0.8). (4) Theme CSS separation - ThemesPage saves to theme_css field, Settings excludes theme_css from save (line 58), Display injects both. (5) #emergent-badge CSS in index.css lines 59-68. (6) Flash Info system - FlashInfoPage.js with send/dismiss/history, backend endpoints /api/flash-alert and /api/flash-alerts. (7) Eco mode in Settings.js lines 174-216 with switch and time inputs, Display.js lines 334-349 has eco mode logic. Display code: 386621. Key data-testids: weather-city-input, eco-mode-switch, eco-mode-start, eco-mode-end, flash-message-input, send-alert-btn, dismiss-alert-btn, flash-info-title.
